Auditing claimDailyBonus and streak logic within DailyAppV12Secured.sol. Checking constraints, limits, and potential vulnerabilities.
Discovered potential streak-logic ambiguity in user-bundle.js where XP deltas are used instead of explicit smart-contract timestamps. Documenting findings.
Investigating claimDailyBonus revert issue reported by user. Checking smart contract logic and agent skills.
